# setup-mediawiki

An **experimental**, **work in progress** GitHub action to set up MediaWiki.
If this works out, I’ll probably move it to a separate repository;
until then, it would be unwise for anyone else to use it.

Mostly unrelated to [ProfessionalWiki/setup-mediawiki](https://github.com/ProfessionalWiki/setup-mediawiki),
though I did look at it for inspiration (before deciding to roll my own).
